title: Data Analytics Graduate Certificate - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Data Analytics Graduate Certificate - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
Data Analytics Graduate Certificate
Apply now
Request info
The Data Analytics Graduate Certificate — an interdisciplinary program offered by the
College of Social Sciences and Humanities
and Khoury College —
provides a strong foundation in data analytics while preparing you for success in a range of careers and master’s programs. The four courses emphasize data management, machine learning, data mining, and statistics, plus the skills you’ll need to visualize data, communicate ideas, and make data-driven decisions in any field.
Explore program requirements in the course catalog
Program details
Advance your career
Advance your career
The ways that businesses, researchers, and governments use data are rapidly changing, and the amount of data across all sectors is estimated to double every 1.2 years. In this increasingly data-driven global environment, the need for data analytics experts grows every day. When you complete this certificate program, you will be prepared for careers like:
Data scientist at Yelp Inc.
Data platform engineer at Egen Solutions
Data scientist intern at Airbnb
User interface developer intern at Micron Technology, Inc.
Pursue your education from anywhere
Pursue your education from anywhere
The Data Analytics Graduate Certificate is 100% online, meaning you can become a data expert from home. Some required courses are also offered at the
Boston campus
, if you want to complete them in person.
Learning outcomes
Learning outcomes
When you complete this certificate, you will be able to:
Use standard tools for data acquisition/management
Use statistical tests and models to quantitatively analyze large and complex data sets.
Select, plan, and implement storage, search, and retrieval components of structured and unstructured information repositories.
Provide data scientists with properly structured, accurate, and reliable access to information needed for investigation.
Set up and run learning algorithms on data sets, test models on new data, and evaluate results.
Use R to explore data, produce summary statistics, and perform statistical analyses; use packages for data mining and machine learning; and use visualization tools to present and evaluate data.
Use visualization techniques to support the discovery and presentation of information.
Choose appropriate visual languages for representing various types of data.
Communicate the results of data analysis to nonexpert audiences.

Meet our faculty
Get to know the engaged, experienced professors who are here to support you every step of the way.
View all faculty
Martin Schedlbauer
Martin Schedlbauer is a teaching professor, and the director of online faculty and programs at Khoury College. He is also the founder, CEO, and CTO of Technology Resource Group, Inc. and a CTO at BEA Systems, and he teaches courses in data and information science.
Read bio
Break into tech without a data background
If you are looking to get into a tech field without computer science or data science experience, then the Align MS in Computer Science or Align MS in Data Science might be for you.
Learn about the Align program
